mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role (name, code, description, enterprise_id, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.code}, #{item.description}, #{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO sys_role (name, code, description, enterprise_id, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.code}, #{item.description}, #{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), code = VALUES(code), description = VALUES(description), enterprise_id = VALUES(enterprise_id), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
